data.story_message:
First,
Josh tried their best to Fix Tha Tractor but accidentally transformed it into an expensive paperweight. Tyrone and Luke were both very disappointed in Josh.
Then,
Tyrone tried their best to Push Tha Car but the car stayed put. Sounds like someone forgot to put it in neutral. Josh and Luke were both very disappointed in Tyrone.
Finally,
Luke tried their best to Chase Tha Coyote but his sneakers were no match for the ACME jetpack that just left him in the dust. Josh and Tyrone were both very disappointed in Luke.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Josh tried their best to Build Tha Fence but forgot to put up the posts first, so it's basically just a bunch of random boards lying on the ground. Fucking retard. Tyrone and Luke were both very disappointed in Josh.
Then,
Tyrone tried their best to Push Tha Car but the car stayed put. Sounds like someone forgot to put it in neutral. Josh and Luke were both very disappointed in Tyrone.
Finally,
Luke tried their best to Chase Tha Coyote but the coyote hit him with a crate of dynamite. Classic Wile E. move. Josh and Tyrone were both very disappointed in Luke.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Josh tried their best to Repair Tha Barn and somehow made it look like a five-star resort for farm animals. The cows mooed in approval!
Then,
Tyrone tried their best to Push Tha Car but the car didn't budge. Josh and Luke were both very disappointed in Tyrone.
Finally,
Luke tried their best to Mow Tha Lawn but the lawnmower refused to start. Josh and Tyrone were both very disappointed in Luke.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Josh tried their best to Fix Tha Tractor but now it's smoking like Josh with a bong. Tyrone and Luke were both very disappointed in Josh.
Then,
Tyrone tried their best to Push Tha Car but the car didn't budge. Josh and Luke were both very disappointed in Tyrone.
Finally,
Luke tried their best to Harvest tha Crops and now the soil is writing him thank-you notes. The local farmer's market gave them a medal!

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Josh tried their best to Build Tha Fence but the only thing he nailed was his own finger. Now a sheep is nailing his wife. Tyrone and Luke were both very disappointed in Josh.
Then,
Tyrone tried their best to Lift Tha Hay but they got squashed like a bug. Josh and Luke were both very disappointed in Tyrone.
Finally,
Luke tried their best to Chase Tha Coyote but the coyote hit him with a crate of dynamite. Classic Wile E. move. Josh and Tyrone were both very disappointed in Luke.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Josh tried their best to Repair Tha Barn but instead built a new home for a family of squirrels who are now demanding rent. Tyrone and Luke were both very disappointed in Josh.
Then,
Tyrone tried their best to Shovel Tha Manure but the whole pile exploded in his face like a dirty prank from the universe. Josh and Luke were both very disappointed in Tyrone.
Finally,
Luke tried their best to Harvest tha Crops but accidentally harvested his own damn boot. Fucking dumbass. Josh and Tyrone were both very disappointed in Luke.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Josh tried their best to Fix Tha Tractor and its running like new. All he needs now is some new boots to run right past her. Yup, on his tractor. Everyone cheered and started to square-dance!
Then,
Tyrone tried their best to Lift Tha Hay but they got squashed like a bug. Josh and Luke were both very disappointed in Tyrone.
Finally,
Luke tried their best to Harvest tha Crops and he succeeded. I guess country girls DO make do. Everyone cheered and started to square-dance!

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

Josh tried their best to Build Tha Fence and succeeded. That required sobriety, lets keep it this way. The whole farm celebrated with a hamburger bubble-up meal!
Then,
Tyrone tried their best to Lift Tha Hay but the haybales got the best of them. Josh and Luke were both very disappointed in Tyrone.
Finally,
Luke tried their best to Chase Tha Coyote but his sneakers were no match for the ACME jetpack that just left him in the dust. Josh and Tyrone were both very disappointed in Luke.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!
